_meta.source: perks/weapons: darkanddarker.wiki.spellsandguns.com/Sorcerer; base stats & skills: api.darkerdb.com/v1/classes (merged by scripts/build-classes.mjs)
_meta.note: Spell merge system is out of scope for the stat engine.

name: Sorcerer
perk_slot_rule: 1 slot + 1 additional slot every 5 levels; 4 slots at level 15 (max)

perks.name: Air Mastery
perks.effect: +15% Air Knockback Bonus and +50% Air Power Bonus

perks.name: Apex of Sorcery
perks.effect: Move at 1% move speed, but +50% Magical Power Bonus, +50% Spell Casting Speed, +25% Action Speed

perks.name: Elemental Fury
perks.effect: For every 1% health lost: +0.5% Cooldown Reduction and +0.25% Magical Power Bonus

perks.name: Innate Talent
perks.effect: +5 Memory Capacity Add; +5 Magical Power and +10% Spell Casting Speed when casting with bare hands

perks.name: Lightning Mastery
perks.effect: +25% Lightning Power Bonus; inflict Electric Shock every 2s while dealing Lightning damage

perks.name: Mana Flow
perks.effect: Successful casts within 3s grant +5% Magical Power Bonus and +5% Magical Penetration, stacks to 3

perks.name: Merged Might
perks.effect: +5 Magical Power when casting a merge spell; +5% Move Speed Bonus for 2s after

perks.name: Spell Sculpting
perks.effect: Spell range 125% and AoE +25%, but radial spell cooldowns 1.25x

perks.name: Spell Stride
perks.effect: +30% Move Speed Bonus while casting two spells simultaneously

skills.name: Sorcery I
skills.effect: Gain the ability to use sorcery in the dungeon.

skills.name: Sorcery II
skills.effect: Gain the ability to use sorcery in the dungeon.
